auth.toggleToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

projects.title: Projects
projects.empty: Nothing in the ledger yet. Add your first project to get started.
projects.detailPlaceholder: Analysis and campaigns will live here.

form.title: New project
form.name: Project name
form.urlError: Add a project name and a valid website (e.g. masaarat.ai).

analysis.title: Website intelligence
analysis.idleBody: This site hasn't been analyzed yet. Run analysis so AI can read your pages and extract your business model, audience, tone of voice, and strengths.
analysis.runningHint: This can take a minute. Keep this tab open.

connectedSites.title: Connected sites
connectedSites.emptyHint: If your site requires login, connect it here so we can read your protected pages. We never see or store your password — only the session.

modal.title: Link site
modal.subtitle: Sign in to your site
modal.instructions: This window is a real browser on your site. Type your email and password there as you normally would. We never see or store your password — we only save the session so we can read your protected pages. When you're logged in, click "I'm signed in".
modal.passwordNote: Your password goes directly to your site — it never passes through us.

channelSettings.title: Available channels
channelSettings.description: Enable only the platforms where you have an active account. Future campaigns will be built around this list.
channelSettings.pickOne: Select at least one channel before starting a campaign.

generate.endBeforeStart: End date must be after start date.

packages.enableChannelsFirst: Enable your available channels above first so we can tailor packages to your platforms.

limited_offer.name: Limited-time offer / discount
limited_offer.description: Short purchase-push campaign for customers who already know the brand and are close to buying.

product_launch.name: New product / service launch
product_launch.description: Introduce a new need to the market and build a clear story from awareness through decision.

brand_awareness.name: Brand awareness
brand_awareness.description: Build mental availability and distinctive assets your audience remembers quickly.

lead_gen.name: Lead generation
lead_gen.description: Draw attention to a specific problem and get interested prospects to share their details.

value_authority.name: Value content / authority building
value_authority.description: Educational content that positions the brand as the guide in its field and builds long-term trust.

quick_post.name: Quick single post
quick_post.description: One post with a specific goal. The marketing framework is chosen at generation time based on the objective.

adaptation.droppedIdeal: This package is designed for {ideal}. We adapted it to {chosen} because the other channels aren't available.
adaptation.noIdeal: None of the package's ideal channels ({ideal}) are available, so we used {chosen}.
adaptation.reducedPosts: We reduced the total post count to {total} to keep a balanced split across your available channels (instead of {original}).

strategist.title: Strategist
strategist.greeting: Hi! I'm your strategist. Tell me about the campaign you want — the goal, the offer, or a general idea — and I'll help you build a plan tailored to your brand.
strategist.enableChannelsFirst: Enable your available channels above first.

postPreview.imagePlaceholder: Image slot — no image selected yet
postPreview.saveItemFirst: Save this item before generating an image

postPreviewGallery.title: Post previews — how they'll look when published
postPreviewGallery.subtitle: Sample layouts for each platform, with image controls (generate / upload / paste URL).
